name: CardVille 1.0.52 UI Stability and WebP Runtime Guard
notes: Scene starts are guarded, UI button states are safer/readable, lobby route ribbon clarifies building assignment, and PNG assets have WebP runtime companions.
label: UI stability + WebP runtime + route ribbon
description: Hardens duplicate scene navigation, stabilizes premium buttons and disabled states, adds route overview polish, and improves asset loading performance with WebP companions.
